content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can now clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 9 (C:9):

Atom C:9 is connected to:
- C:6 (carbon with index 6) - bonded to the left
- C:38 (carbon with index 38) - bonded upward
- H:71 (hydrogen with index 71) - bonded downward
- N:10 (nitrogen with index 10) - bonded to the right

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 360, as indicated by the file name "geomconf_360.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of C:9 are:
- Atom index 6, element C
- Atom index 38, element C
- Atom index 71, element H
- Atom index 10, element N

Geomconf_index: 360

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 9, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
